findings.description: Section s1 contains only 28 characters ('Nablarchのコンテンツの見方を目的別に説明します。'), which is below the 50-character threshold. This introductory sentence could be merged into s2 as a lead-in rather than a standalone section.
findings.source_evidence: Source intro paragraph: 'Nablarchのコンテンツの見方を目的別に説明します。' — this single sentence precedes the bullet list and does not constitute a separate section in the source.
